title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入不丹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入不丹：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) conformity requirements, Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA) licensing requirements, Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and Bhutan's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB 38031, GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Bhutan is a Himalayan, hydro-dominant economy (>99% hydro) interconnected with India's grid; BESS shipments transit via India through Kolkata or Haldia port. High-altitude derating of battery thermal and pressure performance must be considered.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与不丹标准局（BSB）合格评定要求、不丹电力监管局（BEA）许可要求、不丹电力公司（BPC）并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及不丹230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB 38031、GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。不丹是喜马拉雅地区以水电为主的经济体（水电占比>99%），与印度电网互联；BESS货物须经由印度（加尔各答或哈尔迪亚港）转运。须考虑高海拔对电池热性能和压力性能的降额影响。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與不丹標準局（BSB）合格評定要求、不丹電力監管局（BEA）許可要求、不丹電力公司（BPC）併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及不丹230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB 38031、GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。不丹是喜馬拉雅地區以水電為主的經濟體（水電佔比>99%），與印度電網互聯；BESS貨物須經由印度（加爾各答或哈爾蒂亞港）轉運。須考慮高海拔對電池熱性能和壓力性能的降額影響。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSB conformity scope determination, BEA licensing approval, BPC grid-connection approval, NFPA fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bhutan Standards Bureau Technical Regulations, BEA licensing requirements, BPC grid-connection technical specifications, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and India transit import requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSB合格评定范围裁定、BEA许可批准、BPC并网批准、NFPA消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行不丹标准局技术法规、BEA许可要求、BPC并网技术规格、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及印度过境进口要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSB合格評定範圍裁定、BEA許可批准、BPC併網批准、NFPA消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行不丹標準局技術法規、BEA許可要求、BPC併網技術規格、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及印度過境進口要求。

answer_first.en: Bhutan does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS product safety regulation as of the dataset date. The Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) is the national standards and conformity body; the Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA) is the electricity sector regulator; and Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) is the grid operator. Bhutan's regulatory and standards framework is IEC-aligned. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Bhutan are: (1) BSB conformity certification — a mandatory gateway whose scope for BESS products must be verified directly with BSB; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected technical baseline, since Chinese GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 are not accepted as equivalents; (3) BEA project licensing and BPC grid-connection approval — both required for grid-connected installations, with project-specific technical requirements that must be obtained directly from BEA and BPC; (4) Bhutan's grid voltage of 230/400 V at 50 Hz differs from China's 220/380 V at 50 Hz — BESS power conversion systems must be re-parameterised accordingly; (5) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation design — Bhutan's fire code framework likely references international codes but formal BESS-specific adoption must be verified; (6) UN 38.3 transport documentation mandatory under international conventions, with the additional complexity of India transit routing; and (7) high-altitude derating — Bhutan's mountainous terrain requires thermal and pressure derating calculations for battery performance and safety.
answer_first.zh: 截至本数据集日期，不丹尚无经确认的独立强制性国家BESS产品安全法规。不丹标准局（BSB）是国家标准和合格评定机构；不丹电力监管局（BEA）是电力行业监管机构；不丹电力公司（BPC）是电网运营商。不丹监管和标准框架与IEC标准对齐。中国BESS出口不丹的实际差距包括：（1）BSB合格认证——一个强制性门槛，针对BESS产品的范围须直接向BSB核实；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为国际预期技术基准，中国GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受为等效依据；（3）BEA项目许可和BPC并网批准——并网装置均须取得，项目专属技术要求须直接向BEA和BPC获取；（4）不丹电网电压为230/400 V 50 Hz，与中国220/380 V 50 Hz不同——BESS储能变流器须相应重新配置参数；（5）NFPA 855消防安全安装设计——不丹消防规范框架可能参考国际规范，但针对BESS的正式采纳须核实；（6）国际公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输文件，并须考虑经印度转运的额外复杂性；（7）高海拔降额——不丹山地地形要求对电池性能和安全进行热性能和压力降额计算。
answer_first.zht: 截至本數據集日期，不丹尚無經確認的獨立強制性國家BESS產品安全法規。不丹標準局（BSB）是國家標準和合格評定機構；不丹電力監管局（BEA）是電力行業監管機構；不丹電力公司（BPC）是電網運營商。不丹監管和標準框架與IEC標準對齊。中國BESS出口不丹的實際差距包括：（1）BSB合格認證——一個強制性門檻，針對BESS產品的範圍須直接向BSB核實；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為國際預期技術基準，中國GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受為等效依據；（3）BEA項目許可和BPC併網批准——併網裝置均須取得，項目專屬技術要求須直接向BEA和BPC獲取；（4）不丹電網電壓為230/400 V 50 Hz，與中國220/380 V 50 Hz不同——BESS儲能變流器須相應重新配置參數；（5）NFPA 855消防安全安裝設計——不丹消防規範框架可能參考國際規範，但針對BESS的正式採納須核實；（6）國際公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸文件，並須考慮經印度轉運的額外複雜性；（7）高海拔降額——不丹山地地形要求對電池性能和安全進行熱性能和壓力降額計算。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
